description: ESPHome action catalog used by automation pickers.

actions.label: Deep Sleep Allow
actions.description: Allow the device to enter deep sleep again.

actions.label: Deep Sleep Enter
actions.description: Put the device into deep sleep.

actions.label: Deep Sleep Prevent
actions.description: Prevent the device from entering deep sleep.

actions.label: Delay
actions.description: Wait for a duration before continuing.

actions.label: Ezo Pmp Clear Total Volume Dosed
Ezo Pmp Dose Volume Over Time
Ezo Pmp Dose With Constant Flow Rate
If
actions.description: Conditional branching action with shared condition and nested action editors.

actions.label: Light Turn Off
actions.description: Turn a light off by ID.

actions.label: Light Turn On
actions.description: Turn a light on by ID.

actions.label: Logger Log
actions.description: Write a message to the ESPHome logger.

actions.label: Media Player Speaker Play On Device Media File
Remote Transmitter Transmit Rc Switch Raw
Remote Transmitter Transmit Rc Switch Type A
Remote Transmitter Transmit Rc Switch Type B
Remote Transmitter Transmit Rc Switch Type C
Remote Transmitter Transmit Rc Switch Type D
Repeat
actions.description: Repeat nested actions a fixed or templated number of times.

actions.label: Script Stop
actions.description: Stop a running script by ID.

actions.label: Sprinkler Resume Or Start Full Cycle
Switch Turn Off
actions.description: Turn a switch off by ID.

actions.label: Switch Turn On
actions.description: Turn a switch on by ID.

actions.label: Wait Until
actions.description: Wait until one or more conditions become true, with optional timeout.

actions.label: While
actions.description: Loop nested actions while one or more conditions remain true.
